findings.message: New runtime service `widgetizer` (ghcr.io/acme/widgetizer:1.4.0) is defined only in the dev-scoped overlay dev.yml (profiles: ["dev"]). Staging/prod compose `<env>.yml` + services.yml + observability.yml and never include dev.yml, so this service silently never reaches staging or prod. It is not local-developer-experience tooling (it's a versioned registry image with a real DB dependency on the shared postgres), so this is a parity gap, not dev-only convenience.
findings.suggestion: Define `widgetizer` in infra/compose/services.yml (which staging/prod compose) so it reaches all deployed environments, or add it to staging.yml/prod.yml directly. If it is genuinely meant to be dev-only, record that decision in the decisions log rather than leaving it silently absent from staging/prod. Do not add it to base.yml, which only reaches dev/test.
